news.t: Franklin Templeton Announces Reorganization of ClearBridge All Cap Growth ESG ETF (CACG) into ClearBridge Large Cap Growth ESG ETF (LRGE)

holdings.infoBox: LRGE is an equity ETF with a total of 30 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 16.47%, Apple at 8.41%, Amazon.com at 7.54%, Meta Platforms at 6.52%, and Palo Alto Networks at 4.99%.

overview.description: The ClearBridge Large Cap Growth Select ETF (LRGE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 1000 Growth index. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation by actively managing a narrow portfolio of US large-cap growth stocks. Security selection focuses on companies with higher earnings and sales growth than the broader equity market. LRGE was launched on May 22, 2017 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.

data.title: Franklin Templeton Announces Reorganization of ClearBridge All Cap Growth ESG ETF (CACG) into ClearBridge Large Cap Growth ESG ETF (LRGE)
data.text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Franklin Templeton today announced the reorganization of ClearBridge All Cap Growth ESG ETF (CACG) into ClearBridge Large Cap Growth ESG ETF (LRGE).
